[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001100 3
1 00101101 4
2 00101101 4
3 01110001 4
4 00001111 4
5 00000000 a
6 10000100 2
7 00000000 a
